name: Revenge on the Streets
short_description: In the year 201X, a policeman was beaten by bandits and becomes unconscious, his fighter sister Karina Kickboxing decides to do justice with his own hands, and part in seeking of REVENGE IN THE STREETS
detailed_description:
NEW: REVENGE ON THE STREETS 3


REVENGE ON THE STREETS 2


a beat-up game inside a comic book


About the Game

● compatibility with xbox 360 control for one or two players

● This game has big inspiration in the classic mega drive games like "Streets of Rage" "Double Dragon" e "Mighty Final Fight"

● Super rigid control schemes designed for keyboards and controllers.

● Art style, hand-drawn.

● Hardcore difficulty with over 40 different enemies

● has 3 playable characters plus 5 unlockable secret characters

initial plot:
In the year 201X, a policeman was beaten by bandits and becomes unconscious, his fighter sister Karina Kickboxing decides to do justice with his own hands, and part in seeking of REVENGE IN THE STREETS





ending the game at normal level will unlock a secret character, also at the hard level, but if you do not have the patience to release them that way, you have a trick on the character selection screen to release the two secret characters, one is (up, down, back, front, front, front) the other one is (up, up, down, down, up, down, back, forward)
